prompt: In what year did Sir Alex Ferguson retire as Manchester United manager?
explanation: Ferguson retired after winning his 13th Premier League title.

prompt: José Mourinho called himself 'The Special One' at his first Chelsea press conference in 2004.
explanation: He delivered the iconic 'I'm a special one' line at his unveiling.

prompt: In which season did Pep Guardiola win the treble with Barcelona?
explanation: Guardiola's first season at Barcelona produced a historic treble.

prompt: In which year did Jürgen Klopp become Liverpool manager?
explanation: Klopp replaced Brendan Rodgers in October 2015.

prompt: How many Champions League titles has Carlo Ancelotti won as a manager (through 2024)?
explanation: Ancelotti has won the Champions League a record five times as a manager.

prompt: How many years did Arsène Wenger manage Arsenal?
explanation: Wenger managed Arsenal from 1996 to 2018 — 22 years.

prompt: Thomas Tuchel won the Champions League with Chelsea in his first season at the club.
explanation: Tuchel took over from Lampard in January 2021 and won the UCL in May.
